levelUp.title: Level Up
levelUp.chooseSpellMastery: Spell Mastery: pick a 1st- and 2nd-level spell
levelUp.spellMasteryHint: Choose one of each level from your spellbook. You can cast those spells at their lowest level without expending a spell slot, when prepared.
levelUp.spellMasteryNoneAtLevel: No level {{n}} spells in spellbook. Pick later via the spell card.
levelUp.signatureSpellsHint: Always prepared, don't count against your prepared limit, and each is castable once at 3rd level without a spell slot per short or long rest.
levelUp.signatureSpellsNotEnough: Need at least two 3rd-level spells in spellbook. Pick later via the spell card.
levelUp.magicalSecretsHint: Magical Secrets: pick from any class's spell list.
levelUp.noChanges: No additional changes at this level.
levelUp.checklistAsi: Choose: Ability Score Improvement (+2/+1+1) or a Feat
levelUp.checklistSubclassSpells: Add your subclass bonus spells (always prepared)
levelUp.snapshotNote: A snapshot of your current character will be saved before applying changes.

asi.featAbilityHint: Choose which ability to increase by +{{amount}}:

swap.title: Replace a Spell (Optional)
swap.hint: You may replace one spell you know with a different spell of the same level from your class list.
swap.incompleteWarning: Select a replacement spell or clear your selection to skip.

scaling.extraAttack_one: Extra Attack: now making {{count}} attack per Attack action
scaling.extraAttack_other: Extra Attack: now making {{count}} attacks per Attack action
scaling.cantripScale: Cantrip damage scales at level {{level}}: cantrips that deal damage now use more dice

levelUp.hintHp: Take the average for steady growth, or roll your <g>hit die</g> and enter the result.
levelUp.hintBoon: Level {{level}} grants one boon: raise your abilities, or learn a <g>feat</g>.
levelUp.hintSubclass: Your subclass shapes your path from here. Read freely; choose when sure.
levelUp.hintChoices: Your new level asks a few decisions. Everything can be read before you decide.
levelUp.hintSpells: Open an entry to read it; learn it when sure. Browsing never spends a pick.
levelUp.hintSwap: Optional: trade one known spell for another of the same level. Continue to skip.
levelUp.hintReview: Everything you gain at this level, in one place. Confirm to make it real.
levelUp.mcFilteredCause_one: {{count}} class is unavailable: <g>multiclassing</g> requires 13+ in a class's primary ability.
levelUp.mcFilteredCause_other: {{count}} classes are unavailable: <g>multiclassing</g> requires 13+ in a class's primary ability.
levelUp.mcClosedCause: <g>Multiclassing</g> is unavailable: it requires 13+ in the primary ability of your class and of the new class.
levelUp.leaveMessage: Your choices for this level haven't been applied yet; leaving discards them.
